International Journal of Systematic and Evolutionary Microbiology: Last updated May 13, 2011 [View by date]

Below is a list of all papers that are currently in press (i.e. accepted, awaiting processing or awaiting proofing) for publication. Please note that the abstracts and PDFs are derived from authors' accepted manuscripts and that titles and content (including names of proposed novel taxa) are liable to change during preparation for publication. For information on our policy on author self-archiving of this content, please click here.

Note that the appearance of a name in a paper included in IJSEM Papers in Press DOES NOT constitute valid or effective publication of that name under the Bacteriological, Botanical or Zoological Codes of Nomenclature. Priority of names is NOT DETERMINED by the date of publication in IJSEM Papers in Press.

These papers may be cited in the following form:

Kang, H. S., Yang, H. L. & Lee, S. D. (2009). Nitratireductor kimnyeongensis sp. nov., isolated from seaweed. Int J Syst Evol Microbiol (in press). doi:10.1099/ijs.0.65734-0
